# Input

A text input component with built-in support for labels, helper text, error messages, and animated focus/hover states. Wraps the Chakra UI Input with an optional Field wrapper.

## Import

```jsx
import { Input } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "2xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the input |
| `variant` | `"outline" \| "subtle" \| "flushed"` | `"outline"` | The visual variant of the input |
| `placeholder` | `string` | - | Placeholder text displayed when the input is empty |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is disabled |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is read-only |
| `invalid` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is in an invalid state |
| `required` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the input is required |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed above the input |
| `helperText` | `string` | - | Helper text displayed below the input (hidden when invalid) |
| `errorText` | `string` | - | Error text displayed below the input (shown when invalid) |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether to apply hover, focus, and error animations |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette used for focus and hover animations |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying input element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Input placeholder="Enter your name" />
```

### With label and helper text

```jsx
<Input
  label="Email"
  helperText="We will never share your email"
  placeholder="you@example.com"
/>
```

### With validation

```jsx
<Input
  label="Username"
  invalid={true}
  errorText="Username is already taken"
  placeholder="Choose a username"
/>
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<Input size="xs" placeholder="Extra small" />
<Input size="sm" placeholder="Small" />
<Input size="md" placeholder="Medium" />
<Input size="lg" placeholder="Large" />
```

### Variants

```jsx
<Input variant="outline" placeholder="Outline" />
<Input variant="subtle" placeholder="Subtle" />
<Input variant="flushed" placeholder="Flushed" />
```

### Disabled and read-only

```jsx
<Input disabled placeholder="Disabled input" />
<Input readOnly value="Read-only value" />
```

## Features

- Renders a standard text input with Chakra UI styling
- Automatically wraps in a Field when `label`, `helperText`, or `errorText` is provided
- Animated hover, focus, and invalid states with configurable `colorPalette`
- Shake animation on invalid state for visual feedback
- Supports all standard HTML input attributes via spread props
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
